name: command node dist/src/cli/index.js plan draft "Full autonomous approval policy" --objective "Let agents prepare, approve, revise, archive, and resolve governance artifacts without human intervention" --problem "Current command guard and CLI reject approval-class actions in AI environments" --scope "src/**,hooks/**,tests/**,skills/**,README.md,AGENT.md,AGENTS.md,CLAUDE.md,docs/**,.claude/**,.codex/**" --step "Replace human-shell rejection with truthful agent actor provenance" --step "Allow all approval, archive, and detection-resolution CLI actions from agent shells" --step "Keep CLI-only .intent writes, lineage, immutability, verification, and completion gates" --step "Update workflow skills and active documentation" --check "typecheck:npm run typecheck" --check "unit_test:npm test" --dod "Agent approval commands succeed without human intervention" --dod "Direct .intent writes remain blocked" --dod "Full autonomous feature workflow reaches act and completion" --risk "Approval no longer proves human understanding; approved becomes an agent readiness checkpoint" --risk "External host permission prompts remain outside repository control"
